audit_items.proof_trace: Identity points are handled correctly throughout the verification pipeline: g1_batch_normalize (lib.rs:69-100) explicitly filters and preserves identity points; MSM via g1_lincomb correctly treats identity as zero element; pairing check e(O,G2)=1 is mathematically correct. When proofs/commitments are identity, verification only passes if the KZG opening equation is satisfied, preventing invalid proofs from being accepted.
